exercises.title: Technology Progress Tracker
exercises.description: Build a tool to track and visualize quantum networking technology progress.
tasks: Define key technology metrics (coherence, fidelity, rate)
Identify when targets will be reached
exercises.expectedOutput: Technology progress tracking and projection tool
hints: Use exponential fits for progress rates

exercises.title: Timeline Scenario Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze different scenarios for quantum internet development.
tasks: Model impact of accelerators and delays
hints: Use ranges rather than point estimates

exercises.title: Investment Impact Modeler
exercises.description: Model how investment levels affect development timeline.
tasks: Project timeline under different funding scenarios
hints: Basic vs applied research balance matters

exercises.title: Milestone Dependency Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze dependencies between quantum internet milestones.
tasks: Identify critical path to global quantum internet
hints: Some work can proceed in parallel
